name: storage hold
hints: The storage hold has essential supplies for your mission.
Take the space suit, phaser, and shovel - you'll need them all.
The maintenance hatch leads down to the crawlway where the power crystal is.
GO HATC or go DOWN to reach the maintenance crawlway.
notes: Ship's storage hold. Contains space suit, phaser, and shovel. Maintenance hatch leads to crawlway.
